cullify.options.enabled.tooltip: Enables or disables culling of decorative vegetation blocks dynamically depending on distance.
cullify.options.cull_grass.tooltip: Enable distance culling for grass, ferns, and short grass.
cullify.options.grass_distance.tooltip: The maximum rendering distance (in blocks) for decorative grass, tall grass, and ferns.
cullify.options.cull_flowers.tooltip: Enable distance culling for flowers and double-height flowers.
cullify.options.flower_distance.tooltip: The maximum rendering distance (in blocks) for flowers, double-height flowers, and flower pots.
cullify.options.cull_other_plants.toolti: Enable distance culling for marine plants, dead bushes, and other general plants.
cullify.options.other_distance.tooltip: The maximum rendering distance (in blocks) for other decorative plants (dead bushes, pink petals, etc.).
cullify.options.debug_mode.tooltip: Shows the number of culled vegetation blocks per second in the action bar (above the hotbar).
cullify.options.culling_shape.tooltip: The geometric shape of the culling boundary around the player.
cullify.menu.title: Cullify Options
cullify.benchmark.click_to_open: Click to open the benchmark report
cullify.menu.lod_density.tooltip: Reduces plant density in the outer half of the culling radius to optimize rendering.
